content: By combining Chain of Hindsight's feedback processing and HyDE's hypothetical document generation, we can build a self-improving RAG system that automatically corrects its own retrieval errors: when the system retrieves irrelevant context for a user query, it turns the negative feedback on bad retrieval into a natural language hindsight chain, then uses that chain to generate a refined hypothetical document embedding that pulls more relevant context in subsequent retrieval passes. This creates a closed loop of retrieval alignment that requires no manual re-engineering of embedding models or index.
